skills.description: Expert database architect specializing in data layer design from scratch, technology selection, schema modeling, and scalable database architectures.
trigger_conditions: Selecting database technologies or storage patterns
Planning migrations or re-architecting data layers
anti_triggers: You need application-level feature design only
You cannot modify the data model or infrastructure

skills.description: Database design principles and decision-making. Schema design, indexing strategy, ORM selection, serverless databases.
trigger_conditions: Need to design a database schema
Deciding on a database or ORM
anti_triggers: Defaulting to PostgreSQL for simple apps
Storing JSON when structured data is better

skills.description: Managing Linear issues, projects, and teams for issue tracking, status updates, querying projects, and managing team workflows.

Video and audio perception, indexing, and editing. Ingest files/URLs/live streams, build visual/spoken indexes, search with timestamps, edit timelines, add overlays/subtitles, generate media, and create real-time alerts.
trigger_conditions: Start/stop a desktop session capturing screen
Ingest a file or URL and return a playable web stream link
anti_triggers: Do not use for non-video/audio processing tasks
Avoid using for general data indexing without video/audio context
